ohtani.title: Trevor Rogers dominates Dodgers in Orioles' 3-2 win
ohtani.blurb: Trevor Rogers tosses seven scoreless innings, giving up just one hit to lead the Orioles to a 3-2 win over the Dodgers

imanaga.title: Pete Crow-Armstrong's cycle highlights walk-off win
imanaga.blurb: Pete Crow-Armstrong hits MLB's first cycle of 2026 and Matt Shaw walks it off in the Cubs' 5-4 win over the Rockies

suzuki.title: Kazuma Okamoto hits go-ahead homer in Blue Jays' win
suzuki.blurb: Kazuma Okamoto hits a clutch three-run home run and Daulton Varsho collects three RBIs in the Blue Jays' 8-6 comeback win over the Cubs

yoshida.title: Abreu's homer backs Early in Red Sox 5-1 win
yoshida.blurb: Connelly Early's two-hit, seven strikeout day on the hill, and Wilyer Abreu's two-run homer lead the Red Sox to a 5-1 win over the Mariners

okamoto.title: Kazuma Okamoto hits go-ahead homer in Blue Jays' win
okamoto.blurb: Kazuma Okamoto hits a clutch three-run home run and Daulton Varsho collects three RBIs in the Blue Jays' 8-6 comeback win over the Cubs

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in the 10th inning and Rikuu Nishida collects his first RBI in the White Sox 4-3 win over the Tigers

matsui.title: Wyatt Langford drives in a pair in Rangers' 9-7 win
matsui.blurb: Wyatt Langford has a three-hit game with two RBIs and Jacob deGrom strikes out nine in the Rangers' 9-7 win over the Padres
